description: Perform an Equivalence Independent Samples T-Test on the Tooth Growth dataset (/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ToothGrowth.csv). Filter the data to include only records where 'dose' is 2.0. Compare the dependent variable 'len' between 'supp' groups using equivalence bounds of -2.0 and 2.0. Include descriptive statistics in the analysis and save the file to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Bioequivalence.jasp.
